title: Bee Removal in Massapequa Park | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Massapequa Park, Long Island. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Call today for fast service $350-$550.
intro: When bees establish hives around your Massapequa Park property, you need safe and professional removal services that protect both your family and these important pollinators. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal throughout Massapequa Park, handling everything from wall-nested colonies to outdoor swarms. Our licensed technicians use humane methods to relocate bees while ensuring your home or business remains safe and bee-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Massapequa Park residents with same-day and next-day bee removal services. Our team uses specialized equipment and eco-friendly techniques to safely remove bee colonies, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee to give you complete peace of mind.
localContext: Massapequa Park's tree-lined streets and well-maintained homes near Brady Park and along the scenic waterways create ideal nesting spots for honeybees and carpenter bees during warmer months. From the historic neighborhoods around Clark Avenue to properties near Massapequa Lake, our team understands the unique pest challenges faced by Long Island homeowners and responds quickly to protect your family.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive from my Massapequa Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Massapequa Park. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection at your convenience and can typically remove the hive within 24-48 hours, depending on the location and size of the colony.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 bee removal service?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes a thorough property inspection, safe removal and relocation of the bee colony, hive extraction, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and cleanup. The final cost depends on hive size, location accessibility, and whether structural repairs are needed.

faqs.question: Do you kill the bees or relocate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve bee populations, which are vital to our ecosystem. We work with local beekeepers to relocate honeybee colonies safely. In cases where aggressive Africanized bees or dangerous nest locations pose immediate threats, we'll discuss all options with you before proceeding.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: We take comprehensive steps to prevent bees from returning, including complete hive and honeycomb removal, sealing entry points, and treating the area with deterrents. Bees are attracted to residual pheromones, so thorough cleanup is essential. Our service includes preventative measures to ensure your Massapequa Park property remains bee-free.
